provisions.title: Short title
provisions.content:
1. Short title
This Act may be cited as the Adoption of Children Act.

provisions.title: Interpretation
Qualifications for adoption of children
Adoption orders
provisions.content:
4. Adoption orders
(1) The adoption of a child shall be effected by the order of the court of the district in which the adopted child resides, granted on the application of the adoptive parent or parents.
(2) A court to which application for an order of adoption is made shall not grant the application unless it is satisfied—

definitions.definition: a child adopted under this Act
a person who adopts or has adopted a child under this Act
a person under the age of 19 years

a magistrates' court established under the Magistrates' Courts Act (Cap. 04:04).
[ 9 of 2000, s. 2. ]
